Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Razor]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Suriel's Razor is a meter-long rectangular shaft of blue metal with many functions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Suriel possesses a weapon called the Razor.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — The Razor is a weapon made of sapphire steel.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Suriel's Razor is a multi-pronged weapon of shining blades that can bloom from a two-meter bar of blue steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Suriel uses the power of the Razor to catch the wave of chaos-fire.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Razor is a weapon used by Suriel for healing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Suriel's Razor can split into many branches.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 1''' — Suriel possesses a weapon called her Razor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Suriel uses a weapon called the Razor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Suriel uses a weapon called Razor.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
